Thanks for contributing to InferHaven Core! Please read CONTRIBUTING.md first.
For anything beyond a small bug fix or typo, open an Issue or Discussion BEFORE
writing code — surprise feature PRs may be closed with a request to discuss first.
-->

## What does this PR do?

<!-- A brief description of the change and why it's needed. -->

## Linked issue / discussion

<!-- REQUIRED for anything beyond a small bug fix or typo (see CONTRIBUTING.md). -->
Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] New model support / better defaults
- [ ] Other (described above)

## Checklist

- [ ] Scoped to a single change (one fix or one feature, not several)
- [ ] Tested locally — for stack changes, `docker compose up` produces a working environment
- [ ] Ran the smoke test if I touched the devcontainer / compose / workspace surface (`bash scripts/devcontainer-smoke.sh`)
- [ ] Updated relevant documentation (`README.md` / `docs/`)
- [ ] No new external dependencies (or discussed first)
- [ ] Clean commit history — willing to squash/rebase before merge
- [ ] I'll sign the CLA when the CLA Assistant bot prompts me

## AI-assisted?

<!--
AI-assisted contributions are welcome (see CONTRIBUTING.md). The bar is the same
no matter how the change was produced: you understand it, you tested it, and a
human owns it. Note any AI assistance here.
-->
